name: hypertaks
description: Hypertaks Founder operating mode - sized intake gate, then a dynamically tiered team of specialist agents (Nano / Lite / Standard / Prime / Hyper / Omega) across strategy, engineering (incl. Solidity/Web3), marketing, finance, ERP, supply chain, and IoT. Adds Karpathy discipline, TDD/debug/verify gates, and per-tier token budgets.
